title: NEBNext Ultra II RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina: Poly(A) RNA Isolation and Fragmentation
author: Opentrons
materials: NEBNext Ultra II RNA Library Prep Kit

steps.title: This protocol uses multi-channel P20 and...
steps.instruction: This protocol uses multi-channel P20 and P300 pipettes to perform library prep steps on 8-48 input total RNA samples according to the attached NEB user guide (reagents were combined in a few instances to reduce the number of transfer steps required). User-determined parameters are available to specify the number of samples and the magnet engage height and time. ---

steps.title: Use settings in the OT app...
steps.instruction: Use settings in the OT app to pre-cool the temperature modules to 4 degrees C prior to running this protocol.

steps.title: The protocol will alert the user...
steps.instruction: The protocol will alert the user to ensure reagents are present on deck in sufficient volume.

steps.title: The p300 multi will mix the...
steps.instruction: The p300 multi will mix the total RNA samples and oligo-dT beads.

steps.title: The OT-2 will pause for an off-deck incubation
steps.instruction: The OT-2 will pause for an off-deck incubation.

steps.title: The p300 multi will mix the...
steps.instruction: The p300 multi will mix the total RNA samples and oligo-dT beads.

steps.title: The magnets will engage to pellet the beads
steps.instruction: The magnets will engage to pellet the beads. The p300 multi will remove and discard the supernatant.

steps.title: The p300 multi will wash the...
steps.instruction: The p300 multi will wash the bead pellets twice with wash buffer.

steps.title: The p300 multi will add 0
steps.instruction: The p300 multi will add 0.1X TE and mix to resuspend the beads.

steps.title: The OT-2 will pause for an off-deck incubation
steps.instruction: The OT-2 will pause for an off-deck incubation.

steps.title: The p300 multi will add binding...
steps.instruction: The p300 multi will add binding buffer to the beads and mix.

steps.title: The magnets will engage to pellet the beads
steps.instruction: The magnets will engage to pellet the beads. The p300 multi will remove and discard the supernatant.

steps.title: The p300 multi will wash the...
steps.instruction: The p300 multi will wash the bead pellets with wash buffer.

steps.title: The p20 multi will add first...
steps.instruction: The p20 multi will add first strand reaction buffer + random primer to elute the mRNA.

steps.title: The OT-2 will pause for an off-deck incubation
steps.instruction: The OT-2 will pause for an off-deck incubation.

steps.title: The magnets will engage to pellet the beads
steps.instruction: The magnets will engage to pellet the beads. The p20 multi will transfer the elute to the output plate.
